Neurology.author: Mushtaq Bilal, PhD
Neurology.content: An excellent video tutorial by Dr. Whitney Holden on how to use PubMed. She covers: • How to run searches in PubMed • How to limit your search • How to find review articles • How to get citations • How to download free full texts of articles • How to create alerts

Neurology.author: S Blitshteyn MD, FAAN, FANA, Dysautonomia Clinic
Neurology.content: 🚨 Our new paper is published in @JCephalalgia! We discuss the importance of including #POTS and #dysautonomia more broadly in the differential diagnosis of chronic dizziness that neurologists often encounter, especially in patients with #migraine.

Neurology.author: International Journal of Stroke
Neurology.content: 🧠 Dyslipidemia Management in Stroke Prevention ✍ Current evidence and a phenotype-guided, individualized framework for dyslipidemia management across stroke subtypes

Neurology.author: Daniel Gewolb, MD
Neurology.content: ⭐️ The carotid body can be normally seen on CTA of the neck as an ovoid avidly enhancing focus at the inferomedial aspect of the carotid bifurcation 💡 Normal range is ~1-4mm, do not mistake this for pathology (dissection, web, pseudoaneurysm, etc.) 💡 When >6 mm, a small

Neurology.author: Lea Alhilali, MD
